headline: $960 Mn Electronic Potting Compound Market Forecasts, 2026-2032 with Henkel, Dow, Parker Hannifin, ELANTAS, and Momentive and Dominating
summary: The electronic potting compound market for EV chargers is set to grow from USD 0.36 billion in 2025 to USD 0.96 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 14.9%. The demand is driven by advancements in AC and DC chargers, necessitating low-viscosity and high-thermal-conductivity potting materials. DC chargers are leading the market, fueled by high-power deployments and government initiatives such as the US NEVI.
